description: Complete telemetry data catalog for the K10 Media Broadcaster — all iRacing SDK variables, SimHub GameData properties, SimHub plugin outputs, commentary triggers, and computed fields.

sources.iracing-sdk: Raw iRacing SDK shared memory variables (via DataCorePlugin.GameRawData.Telemetry.*)

fields.name: Speed
fields.desc: Vehicle instantaneous velocity in metres per second (native SDK unit)

fields.name: SpeedKmh
fields.desc: Current vehicle speed in kilometres per hour (normalised)

fields.name: MaxRpm
fields.desc: Engine redline / maximum RPM for the current car

fields.name: Throttle
fields.desc: Throttle pedal position after force curves (0=off, 1=WOT)

fields.name: ThrottleRaw
fields.desc: Raw throttle pedal axis position before force curve mapping

fields.name: Brake
fields.desc: Brake pedal position after force curves (0=off, 1=max)

fields.name: BrakeRaw
fields.desc: Raw brake pedal axis position before force curves

fields.name: BrakeABSactive
fields.desc: True when ABS is actively modulating brake pressure

fields.name: LapCurrentLapTime
fields.desc: Elapsed time on the current in-progress lap

fields.name: LapLastLapTime
fields.desc: Time recorded for the most recently completed lap

fields.name: LapBestLapTime
fields.desc: Personal best lap time in this session

fields.name: LapDeltaToBestLap
fields.desc: Live delta vs personal best on current lap (negative=ahead)

fields.name: LapDeltaToBestLap_DD
fields.desc: Delta direction/validity data for best lap delta

fields.name: LapDeltaToBestLap_OK
fields.desc: True when best lap delta value is valid

fields.name: LapDeltaToOptimalLap
fields.desc: Delta to theoretical optimal lap (best of each sector combined)

fields.name: LapDeltaToOptimalLap_DD
fields.desc: Delta direction/validity data for optimal lap delta

fields.name: LapDeltaToOptimalLap_OK
fields.desc: True when optimal lap delta is valid

fields.name: LapDeltaToSessionBestLap
fields.desc: Live delta to overall session best lap set by any driver

fields.name: LapDeltaToSessionBestLap_DD
fields.desc: Delta direction/validity data for session best delta

fields.name: LapDeltaToSessionBestLap_OK
fields.desc: True when session best lap delta is valid

fields.name: LapDeltaToSessionLastlLap
fields.desc: Live delta vs session's most recently completed lap

fields.name: LapDeltaToSessionLastlLap_OK
fields.desc: True when session last lap delta is valid

fields.name: LapDeltaToSessionOptimalLap
fields.desc: Live delta to session-wide theoretical optimal lap

fields.name: LapDeltaToSessionOptimalLap_OK
fields.desc: True when session optimal lap delta is valid

fields.name: LapDist
fields.desc: Distance in metres from the start line on the current lap

fields.name: LapDistPct
fields.desc: Percentage of current lap completed (fraction of track)

fields.name: LapLastNLapTime
fields.desc: Most recent rolling N-lap average time

fields.name: SessionTimeRemain
fields.desc: Time remaining in timed session (-1 until race starts)

fields.name: PlayerCarClassPosition
fields.desc: Player's position within their car class

fields.name: PlayerCarClass
fields.desc: Player's car class index in multiclass events

fields.name: PlayerCarIdx
fields.desc: Player's car index in the session arrays

fields.name: SessionNum
fields.desc: Index of current session within the event (practice=0, qualify=1, race=2)

fields.name: SessionUniqueID
fields.desc: Unique identifier for the current session

fields.name: SessionTime
fields.desc: Total elapsed time since session started

fields.name: SessionTimeOfDay
fields.desc: Seconds since midnight for in-game clock (adjusts for time acceleration)

fields.name: SessionTick
fields.desc: Internal simulation tick counter — increments every frame

fields.name: SessionLapsRemainEx
fields.desc: Accurate laps remaining in the session

fields.name: SessionLapsTotal
fields.desc: Total scheduled lap count (0 for timed races)

fields.name: RaceLaps
fields.desc: Laps completed by the race leader

fields.name: LatAccel
fields.desc: Lateral acceleration. Positive=right, negative=left. Trigger threshold: >4.5G

fields.name: LatAccel_ST
fields.desc: Sub-tick lateral acceleration samples (6 per frame)

fields.name: LongAccel
fields.desc: Longitudinal acceleration. Negative during braking. Trigger threshold: <-38 m/s²

fields.name: YawRate
fields.desc: Rate of rotation around vertical axis. Spin catch threshold: >3.0 rad/s

fields.name: PitchRate
fields.desc: Rate of change of pitch angle

fields.name: Roll
fields.desc: Vehicle roll angle — lateral body lean through corners

fields.name: RollRate
fields.desc: Rate of change of roll angle

fields.name: Yaw
fields.desc: Car heading angle in world space

fields.name: YawNorth
fields.desc: Yaw angle relative to geographic north

fields.name: VelocityX
fields.desc: Lateral velocity (car-local) — used for track map

fields.name: VelocityZ
fields.desc: Forward velocity (car-local) — used for track map

fields.name: BrakeABSactive
fields.desc: True when ABS is actively modulating brake pressure

fields.name: dcABS
fields.desc: ABS aggressiveness level set by the driver

fields.name: TyreWearFL/FR/RL/RR
fields.desc: Per-corner tyre wear remaining (1.0=new, 0.0=worn). Trigger at <0.35

sections.title: Tyre Temperature — Per Corner Zone (Inner / Mid / Outer)
Tyre Wear — Per Corner Zone (Left / Mid / Right)

fields.name: LFwearL/M/R
fields.desc: Left-front tyre wear per zone (L=left edge, M=centre, R=right edge)

fields.name: PlayerTireCompound
fields.desc: Index of tyre compound currently fitted

fields.name: FuelLevelPct
fields.desc: Fuel level as fraction of tank capacity

fields.name: EngineWarnings
fields.desc: Active engine warning flags: waterTemp, fuelPressure, oilPressure, engineStalled, pitSpeedLimiter, revLimiterActive, oilTemp

sections.title: Suspension — Per Corner (Ride Height, Shock, Brakes)

fields.name: LFrideHeight / RFrideHeight / LRrideHeight / RRrideHeight
fields.desc: Ride height per corner — distance from car floor to road surface

fields.name: LFshockDefl / RFshockDefl / LRshockDefl / RRshockDefl
fields.desc: Shock absorber deflection from rest per corner

fields.name: LFbrakeLinePress / RFbrakeLinePress / LRbrakeLinePress / RRbrakeLinePress
fields.desc: Brake line hydraulic pressure per corner

fields.name: *shockDefl_ST / *shockVel_ST
fields.desc: Sub-tick sample arrays for shock deflection and velocity (6 per frame)

fields.name: SessionFlags
fields.desc: Full bitmask of active flags. Race: checkered(0x01), white(0x02), green(0x04), yellow(0x08), red(0x10), blue(0x20), debris(0x40). Caution: yellowWaving(0x100), oneLapToGreen(0x200), greenHeld(0x400), tenToGo(0x800), fiveToGo(0x1000), caution(0x4000), cautionWaving(0x8000). Penalty: black(0x10000), disqualify(0x20000), servicible/meatball(0x40000), furled(0x80000), repair(0x100000). Starts: hidden(0x10000000), ready(0x20000000), set(0x40000000), go(0x80000000)

fields.name: CarIdxSessionFlags
fields.desc: Per-car session flags bitmask including penalty bits for every car

fields.name: PlayerCarDriverIncidentCount
fields.desc: Total incident points accumulated by the player driver

fields.name: PlayerCarMyIncidentCount
fields.desc: Incident points caused directly by the player

fields.name: PlayerCarTowTime
fields.desc: Countdown timer for tow — >0 means car is being towed to pits

fields.name: PlayerCarWeightPenalty
fields.desc: Ballast weight penalty applied to the car

fields.name: OnPitRoad
fields.desc: True when player's car is anywhere on pit road

fields.name: PlayerCarInPitStall
fields.desc: True when car is cleanly stopped in pit stall

fields.name: PlayerCarPitSvStatus
fields.desc: Pit service status: 0=None, 1=InProgress, 2=Complete, plus error states (TooFarLeft, TooFarRight, TooFarForward, TooFarBack, BadAngle, CantFixThat)

fields.name: PitstopActive
fields.desc: True while pit stop service is in progress

fields.name: PitRepairLeft
fields.desc: Mandatory repair time remaining (valid when PlayerCarInPitStall=true)

fields.name: PitSvFlags
fields.desc: Bitmask of pit services selected (fuel, tyres, windshield, fast repair)

fields.name: PitSvFuel
fields.desc: Fuel to add during next pit stop

fields.name: PitSvLFP / PitSvRFP / PitSvLRP / PitSvRRP
fields.desc: Target tyre pressures per corner for next pit stop

fields.name: PitSvTireCompound
fields.desc: Tyre compound selected for next stop

fields.name: SteeringWheelAngle
fields.desc: Steering wheel rotation angle from centre

fields.name: SteeringWheelTorque
fields.desc: Force feedback torque output. FFB spike trigger: >25Nm

fields.name: SteeringWheelPctTorque
fields.desc: Steering wheel torque as percentage of max

fields.name: ShiftPowerPct
fields.desc: Fraction of max engine power — drops during gear shifts

fields.name: ShiftGrindRPM
fields.desc: RPM at which a missed shift causes transmission damage

fields.name: AirDensity
fields.desc: Air density at start/finish line — affects aero downforce

fields.name: AirPressure
fields.desc: Atmospheric pressure (changed from inHg to Pa in 2023 S4 Patch 3)

fields.name: TrackTempCrew
fields.desc: Track temperature at crew area — authoritative value

fields.name: TrackWetness
fields.desc: Track wetness: Dry, MostlyDry, VeryLightlyWet, LightlyWet, ModeratelyWet, VeryWet, ExtremelyWet

fields.name: WeatherDeclaredWet
fields.desc: True when race control declared wet — enables rain tyres

fields.name: WindDir
fields.desc: Wind direction (can exceed one rotation — use modulo)

fields.name: NearestAheadName
fields.desc: Driver name of nearest car ahead

fields.name: NearestBehindName
fields.desc: Driver name of nearest car behind

fields.name: NearestCarDistance
fields.desc: Track distance fraction to nearest car. Close battle trigger: <0.008

fields.name: CarIdxLapDistPct
fields.desc: Track position fraction for every car

fields.name: CarIdxOnPitRoad
fields.desc: Whether each car is on pit road

fields.name: CarIdxBestLapNum
fields.desc: Lap number of each car's session best (-1 if none)

fields.name: CarIdxBestLapTime
fields.desc: Session best lap time for each car (-1 when disconnected)

fields.name: CarIdxLastLapTime
fields.desc: Most recent lap time for each car

fields.name: CarIdxLap
fields.desc: Current lap number for each car

fields.name: CarIdxEstTime
fields.desc: Estimated remaining lap time for each car

fields.name: CarIdxF2Time
fields.desc: Time delta from each car to the leader

fields.name: CarIdxClass
fields.desc: Car class index for each car

fields.name: CarIdxClassPosition
fields.desc: Position within class for each car

fields.name: CarIdxPosition
fields.desc: Overall race position for each car

fields.name: CarIdxSessionFlags
fields.desc: Per-car session flags bitmask (includes penalty flags)

fields.name: CarIdxTireCompound
fields.desc: Tyre compound index for each car

fields.name: CarIdxPaceFlags
fields.desc: Pace car instruction flags per car

fields.name: CarIdxPaceLine
fields.desc: Assigned pace line position per car

fields.name: ErsBattery
fields.desc: ERS battery charge. Low ERS trigger: <20%

fields.name: MgukPower
fields.desc: Motor Generator Unit – Kinetic power output

fields.name: PushToPass
fields.desc: True while P2P button is held

fields.name: IRating
fields.desc: Player iRating (requires iRacing Extra Properties or shared memory)

fields.name: EstimatedIRatingDelta
fields.desc: Projected iRating change at current position

fields.name: CamCarIdx
fields.desc: Car index the broadcast camera is focused on

fields.name: CamCameraNumber
fields.desc: Active camera number within current group

fields.name: CamGroupNumber
fields.desc: Active camera group (cockpit, TV, blimp, etc.)

fields.name: RadioTransmitCarIdx
fields.desc: Car index currently transmitting on radio

fields.name: IsReplayPlaying
fields.desc: True when replay is playing back

fields.name: MemPageFaultSec
fields.desc: Hard page fault rate per second

fields.name: MemSoftPageFaultSec
fields.desc: Soft page fault rate per second

fields.name: IsOnTrack
fields.desc: True when player is in car with physics running

fields.name: IsOnTrackCar
fields.desc: True when car exists in world with physics active

fields.name: IsInGarage
fields.desc: True when player is in garage screen

fields.name: IsDiskLoggingActive
fields.desc: True when IBT telemetry disk logging is recording

fields.name: IsDiskLoggingEnabled
fields.desc: True when disk logging is enabled in settings

fields.name: PushToTalk
fields.desc: True while push-to-talk radio button is held

fields.name: Lat
fields.desc: Geographic latitude — IBT replay files only

fields.name: Lon
fields.desc: Geographic longitude — IBT replay files only

fields.name: Alt
fields.desc: Altitude above sea level — IBT replay files only

fields.name: DataCorePlugin.GameData.SpeedKmh
fields.desc: Normalised speed — available across all SimHub-supported games

fields.name: DataCorePlugin.GameRunning
fields.desc: True when a supported game is connected

fields.name: DataCorePlugin.GameData.AccelerationSway
fields.desc: Lateral G-force — cross-game fallback for LatAccel

fields.name: DataCorePlugin.GameData.AccelerationSurge
fields.desc: Longitudinal G-force — cross-game fallback for LongAccel

fields.name: DataCorePlugin.GameData.AccelerationHeave
fields.desc: Vertical G-force — cross-game fallback for VertAccel

fields.name: DataCorePlugin.GameData.YawVelocity
fields.desc: Yaw rotation rate — cross-game fallback for YawRate

fields.name: DataCorePlugin.Computed.Fuel_LitersPerLap
fields.desc: Rolling average fuel per lap — computed by SimHub

fields.name: DataCorePlugin.GameData.MandatoryPitDone
fields.desc: True when mandatory pit requirement satisfied

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.CommentaryVisible
fields.desc: Whether commentary is active (1) or idle (0)

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.CurrentEventExposition
fields.desc: Short factual event description for HUD

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.CurrentFlagState
fields.desc: Human-readable flag: green, yellow, red, checkered, black, debris, white

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.DS.LatG
fields.desc: Lateral G in HTTP API snapshot

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.DS.LongG
fields.desc: Longitudinal G in HTTP API snapshot

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.DS.VertG
fields.desc: Vertical G in HTTP API snapshot

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.DS.YawRate
fields.desc: Yaw rate in HTTP API snapshot

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.DS.SteerTorque
fields.desc: Steering torque in HTTP API snapshot

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.DS.RpmRatio
fields.desc: Normalised RPM fraction in HTTP API snapshot

fields.name: K10MediaBroadcaster.Plugin.DS.EstimatedIRatingDelta
fields.desc: Projected iRating change at current position

fields.name: spin_catch
fields.desc: YawRate spike > 3.0 rad/s — driver catches oversteer
